tagline: Enjoy A Crystal Clear Pool All Year Without the Hassle

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves a CPO-Certified
Expert
hero.subheadline: Andrew started cleaning pools at 13 and built AJ Pools into South Florida's most trusted pool company. Every technician on our team is CPO-certified, so your pool gets professional-grade care every single visit.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">a Team That Knows Pools Inside Out
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full remodels, AJ Pools handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can spend your time swimming instead of scrubbing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Vacuuming, skimming, brushing, filter cleaning, water chemistry testing, and chemical treatment — your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every week.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Pumps, motors, heaters, salt systems, automation, and re-plumbing. Our CPO-certified techs diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Replastering
cards.description: Restore your pool to like-new condition with replastering, acid washing, and modern upgrades that boost your property value.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Professional maintenance, repairs, and equipment services for condos, HOAs, and community pools throughout South Florida.

cards.title: Emergency Pool Repairs
cards.description: Equipment failures and leaks cannot wait. Our rapid-response team handles urgent issues before they cause further damage to your pool.

cards.title: Salt Systems & Automation
cards.description: Upgrade to salt chlorine generators and smart automation from Pentair, Hayward, Jandy, and iAqualink for effortless pool management.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll send a CPO-certified technician to inspect it. You'll get an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our CPO-certified team arrives on schedule to handle cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and anything else your pool needs. Owner Andrew personally checks in to make sure you're happy.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If you're ever not 100% satisfied, we come back and make it right — that's our Happiness Guarantee.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts AJ Pools
about.headline: Started at 13. CPO-Certified by 18. Trusted for Over a Decade.
about.description: AJ Pools isn't a faceless corporation — it's a local business built by Andrew, who fell in love with the pool industry as a teenager and earned his CPO certification before he could vote. Today, every single employee on our team holds a CPO certification. Andrew still personally checks in with customers because he believes great pool care is built on relationships, not contracts.

features.title: Every Tech is CPO-Certified
features.description: Not just management — every technician who touches your pool holds a Certified Pool Operator credential.

features.title: Owner Checks In Personally
features.description: Andrew calls customers directly to ensure satisfaction. You're never just a number at AJ Pools.

features.title: 100% Happiness Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with any service? We come back and make it right at no charge. That's our promise to every customer.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Happiness Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely happy with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. Andrew built AJ Pools on the belief that you should never have to worry about your pool, and that includes worrying about whether you got your money's worth.

faqs.question: How fast can AJ Pools start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For emergency situations like equipment failures or green pools, we offer rapid-response service. Call us at (954) 803-0952 and we'll get you taken care of.

faqs.question: What does CPO-certified mean and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: CPO stands for Certified Pool Operator — it's the gold standard credential in the pool industry. It means our technicians have passed rigorous testing on water chemistry, pool systems, and safety protocols. Every single AJ Pools employee holds this certification, not just management.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when your team comes?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. After each visit, you'll know exactly what was done and how your pool's chemistry looks.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools like condos and HOAs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. AJ Pools serves residential and commercial properties across South Florida, including condos, HOAs, and community pools. Our CPO-certified team understands the unique requirements of commercial pool compliance.

faqs.question: What if I'm not happy with a service visit?
faqs.answer: Our 100% Happiness Guarantee means we come back and make it right at no extra charge. Andrew personally follows up with customers to ensure satisfaction — it's a hands-on approach that has earned us 168+ five-star reviews.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Customer
testimonials.text: We've been using AJ Pools for 6 years now. The owner Andrew always calls to check in for customer satisfaction. Alicia, the office manager, is on top of things and is extremely responsive.

testimonials.name: Condo Board Client
testimonials.text: Andrew came to our rescue after we fired our old pool company for neglecting our pool. He is a very nice, polite and personable guy who really cares about his work.

testimonials.name: Residential Client
testimonials.text: AJ Pools provide excellent professional pool services and they are extremely dependable. They come once a week and take care of everything. Totally recommend.
